Water Tour > Schedule & Fares

## Schedule & Fares

The tickets can be purchased at Harbour/Water Tour ticket counter at the [Tsim Sha Tsui Star Ferry Pier](http://www.starferry.com.hk/sites/default/files/Ticket%20Counter.jpg) on the date of departure. Ticket counters will stop selling tickets **10 minutes** prior to each departure, please purchase in cash, credit card or Alipay/WeChat Pay.

**Star Ferry’s Water Tour**

Step aboard the fabulous “Shining Star”, a beautiful re-creation of the ferries that plied Victoria Harbour in the 1920s. Relax on the open deck during this one-hour circular journey with fascinating night view of the Hong Kong skylines from Victoria Harbour.

**Star Ferry’s Water Tour : A Symphony of Lights**

Step aboard the fabulous “Shining Star”, a beautiful re-creation of the ferries that plied Victoria Harbour in the 1920s. Relax on the open deck during this one-hour circular journey with fascinating night view of the Hong Kong skylines from Victoria Harbour, together with the multi-media laser show – “A Symphony of Lights.”

**Timetable (Effective from 1 February 2026)**

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | **Tsim Sha Tsui Star Ferry Pier**  **(**[**Ticket Office**](http://www.starferry.com.hk/sites/default/files/Ticket%20Counter.jpg)**)** | **Adult  Fare** | **Concessionary Fare**[**1**](http://www.starferry.com.hk/en/wt-schedule#Remarks) |
| Afternoon Sunshine Tour (15:20-16:25) | [Eshop](https://www.starferrywatertour.com/?locale=en) | HK$230 | HK$160 |
| Romantic Sunset Tour (17:30-18:35) | [Eshop](https://www.starferrywatertour.com/?locale=en) | HK$230 | HK$160 |
| Dazzling Night Tour (19:45-20:30) | [Eshop](https://www.starferrywatertour.com/?locale=en) | HK$280 | HK$200 |

Remarks: \*You may purchase from our [Eshop](https://www.starferrywatertour.com/?locale=en)

1. Concessionary fares are applicable to children (aged 3-12), senior (aged 65 or above) and people with disabilities.

2. Passengers must disembark at the boarding pier upon completion of the tour.

3. For the detailed schedule, please feel free to inquiry us.

---

### Enquiries

 Hotlines: (852) 2118 6213  
 Email: [info@starferry.com.hk](mailto:info@starferry.com.hk)  
 WhatsApp: (852) 6321 8039

| --- | --- | --- |
| **Adult** | $5.0 | $6.5 |

[Back To Top](#top)

1. Any child who is above the height of 95cm will be subject to Child Fare, unless proven otherwise.
2. Eligible for persons upon presentation of Registration Card for People with Disabilities.  The lower deck of each ferry can accommodate a maximum of 4 disabled persons on wheelchairs.
3. Eligible for seniors upon presentation of Hong Kong Identity Card, Senior Citizen Card, or other equivalent documentation; JoyYou Card holders can travel on designated public transport modes and services at a concessionary fare of $2 per trip under the Government Public Transport Fare Concession Scheme for the Elderly and Eligible Persons with Disabilities ($2 Scheme).
4. Monthly Tickets are for sale at Control Room (Next to Mammy Pancake) at Tsim Sha Tsui Ferry Pier starting from 26th of the preceding month to 10th of the month. A recent photo of the ticket holder is needed for purchase.
5. 4-Day Tourist Tickets are for sale at Control Room (Next to Mammy Pancake). Ticket holders can enjoy unlimited rides on all regular Central - Tsim Sha Tsui service, and Wan Chai - Tsim Sha Tsui service, for four consecutive days.
6. Only applied to Wanchai - Tsim Sha Tsui service when the lower deck is not used for passenger carriage. The lower deck of each ferry can accommodate a maximum of 10 bicycles.
7. The actual sailing time may vary due to maritime traffic, weather, sea conditions, vessel deployment and other actual conditions.
